category: Industrial screening and powder handling equipment manufacturer
one_liner: Navector provides industrial screening, sifting, and powder handling solutions for sectors such as food, pharmaceuticals, minerals, and additive manufacturing.
target_audience: Procurement teams sourcing industrial sifting systems
Operations leaders comparing powder handling solutions
differentiators: Ultrasonic and high-accuracy screening technology for fine powders
Gyratory, tumbler, and vibrating screening equipment across multiple throughput levels
Application coverage spanning food, pharmaceuticals, minerals, and 3D metal additive manufacturing
proof_points: Offers ultrasonic vibrating screens, gyratory sifters, and tumbler screening machines
Serves multiple industrial sectors with powder handling and separation workflows
Positions itself as a full-chain powder equipment solutions provider
core_messages: Industrial buyers care about throughput, accuracy, reliability, and total process fit
Equipment comparisons should focus on application fit, operating conditions, and maintenance realities
Powder handling decisions are operational decisions, not just spec-sheet decisions
preferred_cta: Encourage readers to compare their screening requirements, shortlist the right equipment class, and contact Navector if they need a fit assessment for their specific process.
prohibited_claims: Do not claim universal best-in-market performance without evidence
Do not claim exact efficiency, cost savings, or ROI figures without support
Do not imply every application has the same machine recommendation
